etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + 才(才) (cái, "talent") = tree-related material
etymology.interpretation: The character 材(cái, "material; timber") combines 木(木) (mù, "tree"), which imparts the semantic element of wood or tree-related material, with 才(才) (cái, "talent") serving as the phonetic component, indicating pronunciation. This pairing signifies wood or materials derived from trees, hence "material" or "timber."

examples.chinese: 这张桌子是用优质木材制作的(這張桌子是用優質木材製作的)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhuōzi shì yòng yōuzhì mùcái zhìzuò de.
examples.english: This table is made of high-quality wood.

examples.chinese: 建筑工人正在运送建筑材料(建築工人在運送建築材料)。
examples.pinyin: Jiànzhù gōngrén zhèngzài yùnsòng jiànzhù cáiliào.
examples.english: The construction workers are transporting building materials.

examples.chinese: 为了完成这个项目(為了完成這個項目)，我们需要更多的材料(我們需要更多的材料)。
examples.pinyin: Wèile wánchéng zhège xiàngmù, wǒmen xūyào gèng duō de cáiliào.
examples.english: To complete this project, we need more materials.
